200.html:
data

[object]

The JSON:API data array.

attributes [required]

object

Attributes object of a web integration account. Secrets are never returned.

name [required]

string

A human-readable name for the account.

settings

object

Integration-specific settings. The shape of this object varies by integration.

id [required]

string

The unique identifier of the web integration account.

type [required]

enum

Account resource type. Allowed enum values: Account

default: Account

400.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.

403.html:
errors [required]

[string]

422.html:
errors [required]

[object]

A list of errors.

detail

string

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the error.

meta

object

Non-standard meta-information about the error

source

object

References to the source of the error.

header

string

A string indicating the name of a single request header which caused the error.

parameter

string

A string indicating which URI query parameter caused the error.

pointer

string

A JSON pointer to the value in the request document that caused the error.

status

string

Status code of the response.

title

string

Short human-readable summary of the error.

429.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.

request.html:
data [required]

object

Data object for creating a web integration account.

attributes [required]

object

Attributes object for creating a web integration account.

name [required]

string

A human-readable name for the account. Must be unique among accounts of the same integration.

secrets [required]

object

Integration-specific secrets. The shape of this object varies by integration. Secrets are write-only and never returned by the API.

settings [required]

object

Integration-specific settings. The shape of this object varies by integration.

type [required]

enum

Account resource type. Allowed enum values: Account

default: Account
